description: Implement function to copy template files to .devcontainer folder - Create copyTemplateFiles(targetPath string) error in devcontainer.go that copies setup.sh, setup-bash.sh, setup-agents.sh from .devcontainer folder of this project to targetPath/.devcontainer/. Also create .gitignore with '*' content to exclude everything in .devcontainer from git.
note: Implemented copyTemplateFiles in devcontainer.go using Go embed to bundle setup.sh, setup-bash.sh, setup-agents.sh from a templates/ subdirectory. Function creates .devcontainer dir, copies scripts with 0755 permissions, and writes .gitignore with '*' content. All tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: copyTemplateFiles function reads template files from embedded or relative path
Function creates .devcontainer directory if it doesn't exist
All 3 setup scripts are copied with executable permissions (0755)

verification.value: Manually verify copied files exist and have correct permissions
